description: Capabilities for Carrier windows. The injected scripts call Carrier's own commands (settings, open-external, copy/download image, notifications, theme, update check); Tauri v2 blocks IPC from remote origins unless they are listed under `remote`. Keep this list minimal: every listed origin's own page scripts (not just ours) can call the allowed commands. meta.com/oculus.com are deliberately absent — they only appear during Meta-account login redirects, where the injected features can fail soft (an external link clicked there won't open until back on Messenger). Notification is narrowed to the two permission-query commands: banners are delivered by the Rust side via carrier:notify, so the page never needs plugin `notify`/`show` (which would let a hostile FB script pop native notifications past the mute/hide-preview settings). The opener scope lists exactly the schemes the injected code opens: web links, mailto:/tel:, and the macOS privacy-pane deep link.
